description_long: This is a matte black cup with a rounded, slightly bulbous body and a single, smoothly curved handle attached to one side. The cup's surface is predominantly a deep, uniform black, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. On one side, there is a white, pixelated line-art illustration of a person playing a guitar, adding a unique decorative touch. The interior of the cup is also black, matching the exterior for a cohesive look. The handle is proportionate to the cup's size, allowing for a comfortable grip. The overall design is simple yet stylish, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A matte black cup with a rounded body, a single handle, and a white pixel-art illustration of a person playing guitar on one side.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from an angle showing its smooth, matte black surface and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: The handle is centered in this view, with the cup's body mostly featureless and matte black.
description_view_2: This view highlights the handle on the left and prominently displays the white pixel-art illustration of a person playing guitar.
description_view_3: The cup is shown from the back, with no handle or artwork visible, just the smooth black surface.
